title: picris cyprica
intro: Picris cyprica, also known as Cypriot picris or Cyprus oxtongue, is a perennial plant belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant's roots and leaves have been found to possess health benefits, including reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Picris cyprica can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in folk medicine to treat a range of conditions.
